concepts.name: The Planetary Barometer
concepts.premise: Forecast global geopolitical and financial storms before they break using real-time atmospheric radar logic.
concepts.hook: What if global instability had a storm radar, and you could spot geopolitical cold fronts hours before the news reports them?
concepts.metaphor: Severe weather forecasting center tracking global chaos
concepts.motif: Isobar radar sweeps overlapping flight vectors and 3D globe heatmaps
sections: Spinning Up the Local Storm Engine
concepts.why_it_fits: Treating disparate global data streams as atmospheric pressure systems highlights World Monitor's cross-stream signal correlation engine.

concepts.name: The Local Wire Service
concepts.premise: Turn a chaotic 500-feed global news firehose into a silent local AI-powered editorial desk.
concepts.hook: 500 international news feeds are screaming at once, but your local AI just muted the room and handed you the final edit.
concepts.motif: Teletype ticker tape streams morphing into WebGL deck.gl vector maps
concepts.why_it_fits: Leaning into the 500+ RSS/news categories and local Ollama capability showcases its strength as an off-grid intelligence aggregator.

concepts.name: Macro Arbitrage Terminal
concepts.premise: Outpace Wall Street by correlating geopolitical shocks, commodity shifts, and live flight paths in real time.
concepts.hook: Retail traders check stock charts, but macro funds trade off supply chain bottlenecks and military transport flights.
concepts.motif: Split-screen stock tickers syncing with 56 map layer overlays and flight vectors
sections: Live Flight Anomalies vs Commodity Prices
concepts.why_it_fits: Focuses directly on World Monitor's 29 stock exchanges, 7-signal composite, commodity variants, and real-time flight tracking features.
